# TQ Cleaners — Full AI Context

## Company Overview

TQ Cleaners is a licensed, insured, 5-star rated residential and commercial cleaning company founded and operated by Luis in Texas. The company serves 30+ cities across four major Texas metros: San Antonio, Austin, Dallas, and Fort Worth.

**Core differentiators:**
- Flat-rate transparent pricing (no hourly surprises, no upsell tactics)
- Background-checked, trained, bonded teams
- EPA Safer Choice certified eco-friendly products (safe for kids, pets, allergy-prone households)
- 100% satisfaction guarantee (return within 24 hours to make it right, at no charge)
- 5-star rated across all service areas
- Full liability insurance and COI available within 24 hours for commercial clients

**Contact:**
- Phone: (956) 306-6378
- Email: info@tqcleaners.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Website: https://tqcleaners.com

---

## Services

### Standard House Cleaning
Recurring weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleaning for busy households. Covers all living areas, kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, and common spaces. Same team every visit, consistent 50-point checklist.

### Deep Cleaning
Top-to-bottom 50-point reset including inside appliances, baseboards, ceiling fans, air vents, grout lines, and all areas typically skipped during maintenance cleans. Recommended quarterly or as a one-time reset.

### Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning
Complete turnover cleans for tenants, landlords, and property managers. Deposit-back guarantee. Covers inside all appliances, cabinets, closets, bathrooms, and every room. Documented with written records for dispute resolution.

### Short-Term Rental / Airbnb Cleaning
Hotel-quality turnovers between guests. Includes linen service (strip and remake), restocking, photo damage reports, and same-day turnaround capability. Multi-person teams for tight check-in/check-out windows.

### Office & Commercial Cleaning
After-hours commercial cleaning for offices, retail, and mixed-use spaces. Full COI available in 24 hours. Flat-rate contracts. Covers high-touch disinfection, kitchen and bathroom sanitation, and monthly detailed cleaning.

### Custom Cleaning Packages
Tailored plans for unique homes, estates, vacation properties, and businesses with specific requirements. Fully customizable scope and schedule.

---

## Service Areas

### San Antonio Metro (11 cities)
San Antonio, Alamo Heights, Helotes, Leon Valley, Converse, Universal City, Schertz, New Braunfels, Boerne, Stone Oak, The Dominion

### Austin Metro (11 cities)
Austin, Round Rock, Pflugerville, Cedar Park, Kyle, Buda, Leander, Georgetown, Lakeway, Bee Cave, Dripping Springs

### Dallas Metro (4 cities)
Dallas, Plano, Frisco, Richardson

### Fort Worth Metro (4 cities)
Fort Worth, Arlington, Grapevine, Southlake

---

## Pricing Model

All TQ Cleaners services are priced on a flat-rate basis. Customers receive their exact price before the team arrives. No hourly tracking, no upsell tactics, no surprise charges. Pricing is based on home/space size and service type. Quotes are provided within hours of request submission.

---

## Blog Topics

- Deep cleaning frequency for Texas homes (heat, humidity, cedar pollen, construction dust)
- Move-out cleaning checklist for Texas rental deposit recovery
- Airbnb/short-term rental turnover checklist for 5-star reviews
- Eco-friendly and pet-safe cleaning product guide for Texas families
- Commercial cleaning and office productivity research

---

## Founder

Luis is the founder and owner-operator of TQ Cleaners. He built the company on the belief that consistency is everything and that a local, owner-operated team can deliver better results, communication, and value than large cleaning franchises. Luis personally oversees all teams and stands behind the 100% satisfaction guarantee.
